communities.name: Rocket City Pool League
communities.description: Huntsville-area APA + open league players — B/B+/C amateurs sharing the Bumpers and Steve's tables.

communities.name: North AL Aces
communities.description: Strong-side amateurs from Athens, Decatur, and Florence. Mostly B+ and A- players who travel for tournaments.

communities.name: Filipino Cue Heritage
communities.description: Honoring Efren Reyes and the Filipino school of cue artistry. Open to anyone who wants to study The Magician's game.

communities.name: Mosconi Cup Watch Party
communities.description: Pool fans following the Mosconi Cup and the pro tour. Several pros drop in here too.

communities.name: 99-Ball Devotees
communities.description: Players who specifically love the P&B 9-frame Ninety-Nine format. Discussion of break strategies, Efren-mode runouts, and scoresheet trivia.
